question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 74.20% on 2026-03-28 for the Metaculus question "Will an AI model reach a 3 hour time horizon with 80% reliability during 2026?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP for "Will an AI model reach a 3 hour time horizon with 80% reliability during 2026?" will be strictly above 74.20% on March 28. The CP has risen monotonically for 5 consecutive weeks (55% → 62% → 65% → 70% → 72% → 74.2%), with the minimum weekly gain being +2.0%. The threshold equals the current CP, meaning only marginal upward movement is needed. Underlying AI capability progress (Claude Opus 4.6 at 14.5hr 50% horizon, accelerating doubling time) supports continued forecaster optimism. The main risk is trend stalling or reversal, but given 5 weeks of unbroken increases, this is unlikely over the 2-week window. Weighted Monte Carlo across drift scenarios gives ~82%.

factors.description: Strong monotonic upward CP trend over 5 weeks (from question description): 55% → 62% → 65% → 70% → 72% → 74.2%, all weekly changes positive, minimum change +2.0%/week
Threshold equals current CP (74.20%), requiring only marginal upward movement; given the trend has never declined in the observed window, even continued deceleration likely keeps CP above threshold
Fundamental AI capability progress supports continued optimism: Claude Opus 4.6 at 14.5hr 50% horizon, METR TH1.1 shows doubling time accelerating to ~4 months
Manifold market for underlying question at 79% ($14.5k volume), showing broad optimism about AI reaching the 3hr/80% target
CP growth decelerating (7.0 → 3.0 → 5.0 → 2.0 → 2.2 %/week), momentum may slow further as CP approaches 75%+
Current best 80% time horizon only ~31 minutes vs 3-hour target; some analyses question METR methodology and extrapolation reliability
Small risk of negative catalyst from critical analyses of METR methodology (MIT Tech Review, Medium/Gemini critique)

reasoning:
**Forecast: 82% probability that the CP will be above 74.20% on March 28.**

Key reasoning:
- The CP has risen every week for 5+ consecutive weeks, with the smallest gain being +2.0%
- The threshold is exactly the current value, so we only need *any* upward movement
- Underlying AI progress is strong and accelerating (METR time horizons doubling faster)
- Even under a zero-drift model, there's a ~50% chance; any positive drift pushes well above that
- The main downside risk is trend stalling, but 5 weeks of monotonic increases makes outright reversal unlikely in a 2-week window

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/41140) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-03-28 22:40:01 is higher than 74.20%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 74.20%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-03-28 22:40:01, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
